name: Amazon Ads MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Amazon Advertising API enabling AI agents to manage Amazon Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns. Enables programmatic access to campaign creation, bid management, keyword targeting, and advertising analytics for Amazon sellers and advertisers.
use_cases: Managing Amazon Sponsored Products campaigns from advertising automation agents
Optimizing bids and keywords from AI-powered Amazon PPC management agents
Pulling advertising performance metrics and ROAS analysis from reporting agents
Creating and managing Amazon DSP campaigns from media buying agents
not_for: Non-Amazon advertising platforms (Google Ads, Meta Ads require different MCPs)
Organic Amazon SEO optimization (no ad spend required)
Amazon sellers without active advertising accounts
best_when: An Amazon seller or agency wants AI agents to manage and optimize Amazon advertising campaigns — automating bid adjustments, keyword management, and performance reporting.
avoid_when: You're not advertising on Amazon. Amazon Ads API requires advertiser account with active campaigns and API access approval.

auth.notes: Amazon Advertising API uses Login with Amazon (LwA) OAuth. Requires Amazon Advertising API developer access approval and advertiser account linking.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Amazon Ads API access is free; advertising spend costs apply
pricing.paid_tiers: None for API access — advertising budget costs are separate
pricing.notes: Amazon Advertising API is free to use. MCP server from KuudoAI is free open source. Actual ad spend is the cost.

performance.rate_limits: Amazon Ads API rate limits apply by endpoint; typically 1-10 requests/second

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Agents can create and modify campaigns spending real advertising budget — implement safeguards
Amazon Ads API requires developer access approval — not instant access
LwA OAuth token management required — implement refresh token handling for long-running agents
Amazon Ads API versioning evolves — check compatibility with current API version
Rate limits vary significantly by endpoint — implement backoff for campaign management calls
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Controls real advertising spend. OAuth via Amazon LwA. Implement budget caps and approval workflows before giving agents campaign creation/modification rights.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial risk from ad spend. OAuth via Login with Amazon. Implement spend limits and approval gates for autonomous agents.
